game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Duck Life 7: Battle** Duck Life 7: Battle is a duck training and combat RPG where players customize a duck and enhance its five core stats: Power, Health, Defence, Speed, and Special Attack. Players explore 6 distinct world areas using tap-to-move controls, discovering 5 training dojos, each containing 5 unique mini-games with specific tap or swipe controls to improve individual stats, yielding 1-5 stat points per successful completion. The core loop involves training to increase stats, then engaging in over 40 turn-based battles against other ducks, where victory is achieved by reducing the opponent's 100 Health Points to zero through attacks determined by Power and Speed stats. Progression involves winning tournaments, completing quests for rewards, and unlocking 100 different weapons and costumes that provide stat bonuses (e.g., +10 Power, +5 Defence), ultimately aiming to become the world's greatest duck battler.
game_info.description: Train your duck and become the ultimate champion! Build up your duck's stats through training mini-games, then test your skills in turn-based battles against rival ducks. Collect rewards to unlock powerful equipment that boosts your abilities. Progress through increasingly difficult opponents to prove you're the world's greatest duck battler. Victory comes from strategic training and smart combat decisions!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, move duck in world, select actions in battle
Space: Confirm selection, execute training actions, perform attacks
Z: Cancel/Back in menus
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test. Validates that the game initializes correctly, the player can navigate through menus, access training, and enter battles. Tests basic movement and interaction systems.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate to training area, complete a simple training session, then find and engage in a battle. Use basic attacks to test combat mechanics. Verify state transitions work properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate menus, complete at least one training session with stat increase, enter a battle and execute attacks. No crashes or state errors. Game responds to all inputs appropriately.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully navigate menus, complete at least one training session with stat increase, enter a battle and execute attacks. No crashes or state errors. Game responds to all inputs appropriately.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements an optimal strategy to win battles and progress through the game. Tests the full game loop from training to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Train the duck's Power and Speed stats to high levels through focused mini-game completion. Challenge opponents strategically, using optimal attack patterns. Build up stats until capable of defeating the final opponent to achieve GAME_OVER_WIN.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully train stats to competitive levels, win multiple battles, and ultimately achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating all required opponents. Stats should increase measurably, and combat should demonstrate learned strategy.

TEST_3.test_description: Equipment and progression test. Validates the unlock and equip system for weapons and costumes, ensuring stat bonuses apply correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Win battles to earn rewards, unlock equipment pieces, equip them, and verify stat bonuses are applied. Test that equipped items provide tangible combat advantages.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully unlock equipment through victories, equip items, and observe stat increases from equipment bonuses. Combat effectiveness should improve with better equipment.
